title: Rain World music
description: Replaces most of the songs in the game with Rain World's Soundtrack
body:
Replaces every* song with music from the [Rain World soundtrack](https://jamesprimate.bandcamp.com/album/rain-world-selections-from-the-ost).

Made this for myself but figured to post it online incase other people might need it, full list of song changes can be found in Changes.txt

Also try [Threat Music Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/rain-world-threat-music)!

Notice: Do NOT repost this resource pack to any other website
